input.prompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

input.initialPrompt:
I need a CollectionView that supports single item selection and
pull-to-refresh. When the user selects an item, I want to navigate
to a detail page. When they pull to refresh, I want to reload data
from my API. Show me the XAML and explain the ViewModel bindings needed.

data.content:
Here's a complete example:

**XAML (ItemsPage.xaml)**
```xml
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             x:Class="MyApp.Views.ItemsPage">

    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding ItemSelectedCommand}"
                    IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}"
                    RemainingItemsThreshold="0">

        <!-- Pull-to-refresh requires wrapping in a RefreshView -->
        <CollectionView.Parent>
            <!-- see below -->
        </CollectionView.Parent>

        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <VerticalStackLayout Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="18" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" FontSize="14" TextColor="Gray" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>

</ContentPage>
```

Since `CollectionView` doesn't natively support pull-to-refresh, wrap it in a `RefreshView`:

```xml
<RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}"
             IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}">

    <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}"
                    SelectionMode="Single"
                    SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}"
                    SelectionChangedCommand="{Binding ItemSelectedCommand}">
        <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
            <DataTemplate>
                <VerticalStackLayout Padding="10">
                    <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontSize="18" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" FontSize="14" TextColor="Gray" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </DataTemplate>
        </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
    </CollectionView>

</RefreshView>
```

**ViewModel (ItemsViewModel.cs)** using MVVM Community Toolkit:
```csharp
public partial class ItemsViewModel : ObservableObject
{
    private readonly IApiService _api;
    private readonly INavigationService _nav;

    [ObservableProperty]
    private ObservableCollection<Item> _items = new();

    [ObservableProperty]
    private Item? _selectedItem;

    [ObservableProperty]
    private bool _isRefreshing;

    public ItemsViewModel(IApiService api, INavigationService nav)
    {
        _api = api;
        _nav = nav;
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task Refresh()
    {
        try
        {
            var data = await _api.GetItemsAsync();
            Items = new ObservableCollection<Item>(data);
        }
        finally
        {
            IsRefreshing = false;   // stops the spinner
        }
    }

    [RelayCommand]
    private async Task ItemSelected()
    {
        if (SelectedItem is null) return;

        await _nav.NavigateToAsync(nameof(DetailPage),
            new Dictionary<string, object> { { "Item", SelectedItem } });

        SelectedItem = null;        // reset so the same row can be tapped again
    }
}
```

### Key binding points

| XAML Property | ViewModel Property | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `ItemsSource` | `Items` (ObservableCollection) | Drives the list |
| `SelectedItem` | `SelectedItem` (two-way by default) | Tracks the tap |
| `SelectionChangedCommand` | `ItemSelectedCommand` | Fires navigation |
| `RefreshView.Command` | `RefreshCommand` | Triggers API reload |
| `RefreshView.IsRefreshing` | `IsRefreshing` | Controls the spinner |

**Important details:**
- **Reset `SelectedItem` to `null`** after navigation — otherwise re-tapping the same row won't fire the command again.
- **Set `IsRefreshing = false`** in a `finally` block so the spinner always stops, even on errors.
- `RefreshView` wraps the `CollectionView`; the `CollectionView` itself has no refresh support.
